CacheState.description: Cache prefix + invalidation tracking for sanctum + model-resolution caches.

cache_prefix.description: Stable prefix derived from sanctum + model + manifest version.
cache_prefix.title: Cache Prefix

entries_count.description: Number of entries currently held under this prefix.
entries_count.title: Entries Count

last_invalidated_at.description: Timezone-aware timestamp of the most recent invalidation event; None means 'never invalidated since process start'.
last_invalidated_at.title: Last Invalidated At

CacheState.title: CacheState

ComponentSelection.description:
Which lesson components are selected for this run.

The closed component set at S2 is ``deck`` / ``motion`` / ``workbook``.
``deck`` is the base; ``motion`` and ``workbook`` are consumers of the deck
(a typed producer->consumer DAG resolved by the composer). Widening the set
(podcast / quiz) is a later governance act, not a runtime flag.
ComponentSelection.title: ComponentSelection

level.description: Closed enum: per_call | per_specialist | registry_default | auto_select_fallback.
level.title: Level

requested.description: The model the caller requested at this level (None if no override was provided at this level — e.g. registry_default level always has requested=None).
requested.title: Requested

resolved.description: The model the cascade resolved to at this level.
resolved.title: Resolved

reason.description: Free-text explanation of why this level resolved as it did.
reason.title: Reason

cache_prefix_hash.description: Deterministic SHA-256 hex of the cache-prefix tuple; None for non-final cascade entries that don't carry the cache identity.
cache_prefix_hash.title: Cache Prefix Hash

NodeCheckpoint.description: Single-node checkpoint record. Cross-field invariant: complete ⇒ completed_at.

status.description: Closed enum: pending | running | complete | failed.
status.title: Status

checkpoint_at.description: Timezone-aware timestamp of this checkpoint write.
checkpoint_at.title: Checkpoint At

sanctum_fingerprint.description: Content-addressable sanctum identity at this checkpoint. Optional in 1.2 substrate; downstream stories tighten when applicable.

NodeCheckpoint.title: NodeCheckpoint

ProductionEnvelope.description:
Canonical cross-specialist accumulator for production composition.

This is distinct from ``RunState.cache_state.cache_prefix``, which remains
per-specialist scratch for isolated scaffold execution.
ProductionEnvelope.title: ProductionEnvelope

SanctumFingerprint.description: Content-addressable snapshot identity. Frozen by architecture invariant.

snapshot_id.description: UUID4 identity for this fingerprint instance.
snapshot_id.title: Snapshot Id

content_sha256.description: Lowercase-hex SHA-256 of the snapshot's canonical bytes.
content_sha256.title: Content Sha256

SanctumFingerprint.title: SanctumFingerprint

SpecialistContribution.description:
One immutable specialist output appended to a production envelope.

S2 (SCP 2026-06-11 segment-data-plane, per-node keying): ``node_id``
identifies the manifest node that produced this contribution — the unit
of contribution is the node, not the specialist (Winston A-ruling).
``None`` only on legacy v1 envelopes deserialized from disk. ``attempt``
records same-node retry provenance (Murat regression shape: retry
overwrites, never duplicate-appends).
SpecialistContribution.title: SpecialistContribution

StoryState.description: One story's execution slice: identity + ordered checkpoint history.

node_checkpoints.description: Ordered history of node checkpoints for this story (append-only by convention).
node_checkpoints.title: Node Checkpoints

updated_at.description: Timezone-aware timestamp of the most recent state mutation.
updated_at.title: Updated At

StoryState.title: StoryState

description: Top-level run state. Encodes NFR-X1–X5 reproducibility invariants.

status.description: Closed enum: pending | running | complete | failed.
status.title: Status

graph_version.description: Frozen graph version identifier; 1.2 stub-validated against ALLOWED_GRAPH_VERSIONS (Slab 4 Story 4.5 wires the real registry).
graph_version.title: Graph Version

temperature.description: NFR-X5: documented temperature variance bound to [0.0, 2.0].
temperature.title: Temperature

model_resolution_trail.description: NFR-X4: append-only resolution trail. ModelResolutionEntry is a STUB shape in 1.2; Story 1.3 replaces it with the full cascade entry.
model_resolution_trail.title: Model Resolution Trail

sanctum_fingerprint.description: NFR-X3: content-addressable sanctum snapshot identity at run-start.

story_states.description: Per-story execution slices captured under this run.
story_states.title: Story States

cache_state.description: Optional cache-prefix tracking; populated by D5 cold-read flow.

production_envelope.description: Production composition accumulator. Distinct from cache_state, which remains per-specialist scratch.

component_selection.description: Compile-time component selection this run composed + froze (S2). Persisted in the run record so the resume/recover walk REHYDRATES it and recomposes the SAME graph — never re-defaults (two-walk trap). None on legacy runs predating composition.

llm_execution_mode.description: Run-level LLM transport switch (Batch epic B6-land). realtime (default) = existing live calls; batch = opt-in LiteLLM Batch for A3-eligible sites only (vision first). Distinct from tracked/ad-hoc execution_mode in run_constants.
llm_execution_mode.title: Llm Execution Mode

title: RunState
